enrichment.top_upsell_reason: Bundle with Revit, Civil 3D, Navisworks for full AEC workflow

homepage.title: Microrep home
homepage.description: Metrology instruments for inspection of plug gage, ring gauge, thread gauge, indicator, pipe gage. Temperature and humidity data logger. Retrofit and upgrade for ULM.
homepage.text_excerpt:
Microrep home
MICROREP
Metrology Products for Gage Calibration
Measuring instruments for the inspection of solid gauges, for calibration laboratories and mechanical companies, in compliance with the provisions of the quality systems certification according to the ISO 9001, IATF 16949 and ISO 17025 standards.
Our product range includes measuring systems for the control of solid gauges such as plain plug, thread plug, plain and thread ring, pipe thread, snap gage, indicator, electronic probes, lever indicator, micrometer, angle measurement, temperature and humidity monitoring.
Laboratory accredited to ISO 17025
DMS 680
Universal Length Measuring System
For the inspection of hard-solid gage, reference gage, master and different gages including plug gage, ring gage, thread plug gage, thread ring gage, gage block, snap gage, pipe thread gage, spline gage, external micrometer, internal micrometer, dial indicator and electronic probe.
more
Products
DMS 680
Universal Length Measuring System
PLS 800
Instrument setting and checking
DMS 1000
Gage block and hard gage inspection
TPH.01
Data logger for Temperature and Humidity;
DG 25
Dial Indicator and Bore gage testing equipment
DDH 150
Digital Dividing Head
MicroNet
Software to Manage and Measure gage
CalcAll
Work-piece and gage Tolerance calculation software
ULM Retrofit
Retrofit Kit to computerize old ULM type units
